calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: EDWARD SINGER,JR FOR PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN DE
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ANGELA CHOI FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL LEE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENC HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT TO PAY $4937.37 IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS AT 5% INTEREST. $100 DUE PER MONTH STARTING ON 9/5/05 AND BALLOON PAYMENT DUE ON 9/5/06.
DEFENDANT TO VACATE PROPERTY AT 508 LARKIN STREET, #603 BY 8/15/05, 4PM. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF STIPULATION, JUDGMENT WILL NOT BE ENTERED.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (218)
